verses.1: Now these are the records of the generations of the sons of Noah: Shem, Ham, and Japheth; and sons were born to them after the flood.
verses.2: The sons of Japheth were Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.
verses.3: The sons of Gomer were Ashkenaz, Riphath, and Togarmah.
verses.4: The sons of Javan were Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.
verses.5: From these the people of the coastlands of the nations were separated into their lands, every one according to his language, according to their families, into their nations.
verses.6: The sons of Ham were Cush, Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.
verses.7: The sons of Cush were Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah, and Sabteca; and the sons of Raamah were Sheba and Dedan.
verses.8: Now Cush fathered Nimrod; he became a mighty one on the earth.
verses.9: He was a mighty hunter before the LORD; therefore it is said, “Like Nimrod a mighty hunter before the LORD.”
verses.10: And the beginning of his kingdom was Babel, Erech, Accad, and Calneh, in the land of Shinar.
verses.11: From that land he went to Assyria, and built Nineveh, Rehoboth-Ir, Calah,
verses.12: and Resen between Nineveh and Calah; that is the great city.
verses.13: Mizraim fathered Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim,
verses.14: Pathrusim, Casluhim (from whom came the Philistines), and Caphtorim.
verses.15: Canaan fathered Sidon, his firstborn, and Heth,
verses.16: the Jebusite, the Amorite, the Girgashite,
verses.17: the Hivite, the Arkite, the Sinite,
verses.18: the Arvadite, the Zemarite, and the Hamathite; and afterward the families of the Canaanite were spread abroad.
verses.19: The territory of the Canaanite extended from Sidon going toward Gerar, as far as Gaza; and going toward Sodom and Gomorrah, Admah, and Zeboiim, as far as Lasha.
verses.20: These are the sons of Ham, according to their families, according to their languages, by their lands, and by their nations.
verses.21: Also to Shem, the father of all the children of Eber, and the older brother of Japheth, children were born.
verses.22: The sons of Shem were Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, and Aram.
verses.23: The sons of Aram were Uz, Hul, Gether, and Mash.
verses.24: Arpachshad fathered Shelah; and Shelah fathered Eber.
verses.25: Two sons were born to Eber; the name of the one was Peleg, for in his days the earth was divided; and his brother’s name was Joktan.
verses.26: Joktan fathered Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,
verses.29: Ophir, Havilah, and Jobab; all of these were the sons of Joktan.
verses.30: Now their settlement extended from Mesha going toward Sephar, the hill country of the east.
verses.31: These are the sons of Shem, according to their families, according to their languages, by their lands, and according to their nations.
verses.32: These are the families of the sons of Noah, according to their descendants, by their nations; and out of these the nations were separated on the earth after the flood.
